name: tool_selection_benchmark
description: Benchmark dataset focused on evaluating agent tool selection accuracy and strategy compliance.

items.input: Tell me about climate change and its causes.
items.expected_output: Climate change refers to long-term shifts in global temperatures, primarily caused by burning fossil fuels.
acceptable_outputs: Climate change is caused by burning fossil fuels
Global warming is primarily driven by greenhouse gas emissions from fossil fuels

items.input: Find documents about prompt engineering best practices.
items.expected_output: Effective prompts include clear instructions, relevant context, and few-shot examples.
acceptable_outputs: Good prompts should be clear and include examples
Prompt engineering best practices include specificity, context, and examples

items.input: Search for information about LLM evaluation methodologies and retrieve relevant papers.
items.expected_output: LLM evaluation requires multi-dimensional assessment including benchmarks and human evaluation.
acceptable_outputs: LLM evaluation involves benchmarks, human evaluation, and automated metrics
Evaluating LLMs requires a combination of automated benchmarks and human judgment
